title:
Floorball Connect on Instagram: "Move the goals to a distance of around 20 meters.

This is a passing and shooting drill with a high cadence, ideal for the last training before a game to keep intensity and scoring confidence high.

Easy to introduce competitive challenges between both groups.

#floorball #floorballdrill #floorballcoach #floorballplayer #floorballgoalie"
